text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, July 19. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. First United Mortgage offered 5.75% with zero points. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.75% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. He is doing so well. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
